schema_name: Korea PIPA Cross-Border Review Input Schema
description: Hybrid input schema for policy-based review under Korea's Personal Information Protection Act, covering lawful basis, minimization, notices, processor governance, cross-border transfers, security controls, sensitive/unique identifiers, and automated decisions.

current_region.description: Current region or hosting location where the dataset is stored or processed.

encryption_at_rest.description: Whether encryption at rest is enabled for the target dataset or resource.

encryption_in_transit.description: Whether encryption is applied in transit.

access_control_in_place.description: Whether access control, least privilege, and authentication controls are in place.

contains_sensitive_data.description: Whether the dataset contains sensitive information under PIPA Article 23.

has_unique_identifier.description: Whether the dataset contains unique identifying information such as resident registration number, passport number, driver's license number, or alien registration number.

uses_resident_registration_number.description: Whether resident registration numbers are processed.

uses_processor.description: Whether a third-party processor, cloud vendor, SaaS provider, or entrusted party processes the personal information.

is_automated_decision_only.description: Whether a fully automated system, including AI, makes a decision using personal information.

dataset_name.description: Business-friendly name of the dataset being reviewed.

target_region.description: Target region or hosting location after transfer or processing.

processing_purpose_defined.description: Whether the purpose of processing is clearly defined and documented.

lawful_basis.description: PIPA Article 15 basis for collection and use.

data_minimized.description: Whether only the minimum necessary personal information is collected.

retention_period_defined.description: Whether retention period and deletion timing are defined.

privacy_notice_available.description: Whether required notices or privacy notice information are available to data subjects.

privacy_policy_available.description: Whether a privacy policy containing required PIPA Article 30 items is published or available.

consent_notice_clear.description: When consent is used, whether consent items are separated and clearly presented.

consent_withdrawal_process_ready.description: Whether data subjects can withdraw consent or request processing suspension.

third_party_sharing.description: Whether personal information is provided to a third party.

third_party_provision_consent_or_basis.description: Whether a valid consent or statutory basis exists for third-party provision.

sensitive_data_basis.description: Basis for processing sensitive information, if any.

unique_identifier_basis.description: Basis for processing unique identifying information, if any.

resident_registration_statutory_basis.description: Whether a law or decree specifically permits or requires resident registration number processing.

dpa_in_place.description: Whether a written entrustment/processor agreement is in place.

processor_public_disclosure.description: Whether entrusted work and processor information are made easily available to data subjects.

processor_supervision_done.description: Whether processor education, supervision, and processing status checks are performed.

subprocessor_controls_in_place.description: Whether onward entrustment or subprocessor use is controlled by prior authorization and contractual terms.

separate_consent_for_transfer.description: Whether separate consent for overseas transfer has been obtained.

treaty_or_statutory_transfer_basis.description: Whether a law, treaty, or international agreement specifically permits the overseas transfer.

contract_necessity_disclosed_or_notified.description: Whether transfer by processing entrustment/storage is necessary for contract formation/performance and required information is disclosed in the privacy policy or notified to the data subject.

pipa_certified_recipient.description: Whether the recipient has a PIPC-designated privacy certification and required measures are taken.

pipa_equivalence_recognition_exists.description: Whether PIPC recognizes the destination country or international organization as substantially equivalent in protection level.

cross_border_notice_provided.description: Whether overseas transfer notice items are provided, including transferred items, country, timing/method, recipient, purpose/retention, and refusal method/effect.

transfer_protection_measures_ready.description: Whether protective measures for overseas transfer are ready.

onward_transfer_controls.description: Whether controls exist for onward transfer to a third country by the overseas recipient.

data_subject_rights_process_ready.description: Whether processes exist for access, correction, deletion, suspension, withdrawal, and other data subject rights.

automated_decision_significant_effect.description: Whether the automated decision significantly affects the data subject's rights or obligations.

automated_decision_rights_ready.description: Whether refusal, explanation request, human intervention, reprocessing, and explanation procedures are ready for automated decisions.

provides_explanation.description: Whether explanations for automated decisions are provided or available on request.

human_review_available.description: Whether human intervention or reprocessing is available when a data subject exercises rights regarding automated decisions.

privacy_officer_assigned.description: Whether a privacy officer or responsible person is assigned.

breach_response_ready.description: Whether incident and breach response procedures are ready.

target_country.description: Country inferred from target_region when possible.

target_country_known.description: Whether target country could be inferred or supplied.

transfer_outside_korea.description: Whether the target country is outside Korea.

is_third_country_transfer.description: Alias for transfer_outside_korea, kept for UI/evaluation compatibility.

baseline_security_controls_ready.description: Whether encryption at rest, encryption in transit, and access control are all ready.

pipa_transfer_basis_available.description: Whether at least one PIPA Article 28-8 overseas transfer route appears available.

collection_strategy.auto: Use cloud and security configuration where possible.
collection_strategy.semi_auto: Use data inventory, tagging, and architecture metadata where available.
collection_strategy.manual: Use business, legal, privacy, and vendor documentation to confirm legal bases and notices.
